codeReview.summary: This fix adequately addresses all three prior blocking issues. The OpenTelemetry initialization is now wired at daemon startup (commit 9da0572), and spans are properly created in both Anthropic (ab1718e) and OpenAI (ab1718e) LLM backends with full GenAI semantic conventions. All 8 otel GenAI tests pass.

issues.description: GenAiSpanBuilder struct is still marked #[allow(dead_code)] but is not used by LLM backends. The backends use Span directly with GenAiSpanExt trait instead, which is a valid alternative implementation. Not blocking since the functionality is complete via the trait.

fixAdequacy: adequate - The fix addresses all three prior blocking issues: (1) OtelConfig struct is now instantiated via OtelConfig::from_env() at daemon startup in main.rs:17 and passed to init_tracer_provider(), (2) Spans are now created via tracer.span_builder() and tracer.build() in both anthropic.rs:204-228 and openai.rs:253-274, (3) init_tracer_provider() is called at daemon startup before any LLM execution. The implementation fully covers expectedBehavior with gen_ai.operation.name, gen_ai.provider.name, gen_ai.request.model, gen_ai.usage.input_tokens, gen_ai.usage.output_tokens, gen_ai.response.model, latency_ms, and cost.usd attributes. Build passes and 8 otel GenAI tests pass.
